errorPhoneInvalid: Only numbers and the characters + - ( ), between 7 and 15 characters
errorCoCc: Numbers only, between 6 and 10 digits (no letters or symbols)
errorPeDni: Numbers only, exactly 8 digits (no letters or symbols)
errorBoCi: Between 4 and 8 digits, with an optional trailing letter (e.g. 1234567A)
errorCrCi: Numbers only, exactly 9 digits (no letters or symbols)
errorEcCi: Invalid ID — must be 10 valid digits (no letters or symbols)
errorGtDpi: Numbers only, exactly 13 digits (no letters or symbols)
errorPaCi: Only numbers and hyphens, format X-XXX-XXXX
